node.statement: E4 (right, p∘h_{b,a} term). p=P(a^2) in A=Im P with ||p||<=C||a||^2 (node 1.1); h_{b,a}=b∘a-P(b∘a) in Ker P with ||h_{b,a}||<=C||a||||b|| (node 1.2, def square-hole). Since ∘ is commutative (def jordan-product), p∘h_{b,a}=h_{b,a}∘p. Apply GT-FI (first insertion) with n=h_{b,a} in Ker P and c=p in A: ||P(h_{b,a}∘p)||<=C sqrt(eta)||h_{b,a}||||p||<=C sqrt(eta)·C||a||||b||·C||a||^2=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Hence ||P(p∘h_{b,a})||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses GT-FI, def square-hole, def near-fixed-algebra, def jordan-product.
